case_title: ROSCOE E DIXON VS. AMERICAN HOME SHIELD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIXON, ROSCOE E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME SHIELD $2,498.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,563.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIXON, ROSCOE E AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN HOME SHIELD
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY DIXON, ROSCOE E

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
